command:
uv run python -c 
import json, subprocess
r = subprocess.run(['uv','run','python','-u','-m','arf.scripts.aggregators.aggregate_task_types','--format','json'], capture_output=True, text=True)
data = json.loads(r.stdout)
for t in data['task_types']:
    if t['task_type_id'] == 'feature-engineering':
        print('id:', t['task_type_id'])
        print('optional_steps:', t['optional_steps'])
        print('has_external_costs:', t.get('has_external_costs'))
